# AgentK

> AgentK is a free Reddit lead generation tool. It scans subreddits every 5 minutes and sends instant Telegram and Discord alerts the moment a buyer-intent post matching your keywords goes live — so you reach that lead before anyone else.

## What AgentK Does

AgentK finds leads on Reddit automatically. It monitors any public subreddit 24/7, matches posts against your keywords, and delivers real-time alerts via Telegram or Discord — typically within 6 minutes of a post going live. Over 430 million people use Reddit. Many of them are actively asking for products and services like yours. AgentK surfaces those posts the instant they appear.

## Key Features

- **Reddit lead generation**: Scans subreddits every 5 minutes, detects buyer-intent posts, alerts you immediately
- **Instant alerts**: Telegram and Discord notifications with post title, author, upvotes, comments, and direct link
- **50 keywords** per account, **5 subreddits** per account, **unlimited alerts**
- **Filters**: Minimum upvotes, minimum comments, minimum author karma, hourly alert cap
- **Save leads to lists**: Bookmark any post to a named lead list (Prospects, Hot Leads, etc.) from the feed or directly from bot alerts
- **AI-powered filtering**: Switch to AI mode to filter posts by intent in plain English — finds leads keyword matching alone would miss
- **Completely free**: No credit card, no trial period, no usage limits, ever

## Use Cases

- Founders finding people who are actively looking for a tool like theirs
- Sales teams catching "looking for a CRM / SEO tool / dev agency" buyer-intent posts
- Marketers tracking competitor brand mentions and switching signals
- Recruiters finding hiring posts in professional and startup subreddits
- Agencies prospecting for clients describing problems they solve
- SaaS founders monitoring niche communities for feature requests and pain points

## How It Works

1. Create a free account (Google OAuth or email/password)
2. Enter keywords to track (e.g., "looking for CRM", "need SEO help", competitor names)
3. Select subreddits to watch (e.g., r/entrepreneur, r/SaaS, r/startups)
4. Connect Telegram bot or Discord server
5. AgentK monitors 24/7 and delivers lead alerts instantly

## Pricing

Free forever. No paid plans. No credit card required. All features included.

## Company

- Website: https://tryagentk.com
- Support: support@agentk.io
- Privacy Policy: https://tryagentk.com/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://tryagentk.com/terms

## Technical Stack

- Frontend: Next.js (React), deployed on Vercel
- Backend: Convex (real-time database and serverless functions)
- Auth: Convex Auth with Google OAuth and email/password
- Notifications: Telegram Bot API, Discord Bot API
- AI filtering: Google Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite via OpenRouter
- Data source: Reddit public API
